summary: Completed testing of NEW LLM Explanation feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed: LLM Explanation column visible (21 total columns), Explain button works, cached explanations persist after refresh, model label 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' displays correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 500 seeded incidents (from previous test run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM Explanation feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/explain/{alias} (compute/cache), POST /api/explain/{alias}?force=true (regenerate), GET /api/explain/{alias} (cache-only). Frontend: 'LLM Explanation' is 21st column in NOC Incidents table, uncached rows show '✨ Explain' button (data-testid='explain-btn-{alias}'), cached rows show explanation text with model label (data-testid='llm-explanation-{alias}'). Claude Haiku 4.5 (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) is LIVE via Emergent LLM key - not mocked. LLM calls take 2-5s, cache hits are instant.

TestExplainPostEndpoint.test_explain_post_valid_alias_returns_20: PASSED - returns alias, text (non-empty), model='claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', decision, probability, ts
TestExplainPostEndpoint.test_explain_post_returns_cached_on_seco: PASSED - same ts on second call (cache hit)

TestIncidentsExplanationField.test_incidents_rows_have_explanation_key: PASSED - all rows have 'explanation' key (null or object)

frontend_tests.LLM Explanation Column Header: PASSED - 'LLM Explanation' is 21st (last) column in NOC Incidents table
frontend_tests.Explain Button Rendering: PASSED - 22 uncached rows show '✨ Explain' button with data-testid='explain-btn-NOC-{alias}'
frontend_tests.Explain Button Click: PASSED - clicked button for NOC-5000078, LLM response appeared within 20s
frontend_tests.Explanation Text Display: PASSED - explanation text rendered in div with data-testid='llm-explanation-NOC-{alias}'
frontend_tests.Cache Persistence: PASSED - after page refresh, cached explanations persist (5 cached after testing)

mocked_apis.Claude Haiku 4.5: LIVE via Emergent LLM key (not mocked)
mocked_apis.OCI Iris IncidentAPI: Remains in mock mode (unchanged from previous iterations)
